creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
(In reply to russo from comment #16)
And I've looked at all the files mentioned in comment #14 after updating to 2.4.16_3,2 and all of them have been fixed.

Puzzling that you're still seeing the problem after the update, because they're all fixed for me.

The person who committed that fix did not reference this bug in the git commit message, and I wonder if they're following this report at all.
